main.description: Update the configuration of a space. The authenticated user must be the space owner. Omitted fields are left unchanged. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

space.description: Reference to the space to update.

managingApp.description: Service identifier (e.g. did:web:example.com#forum) of the application that manages this space. Pass an empty string to clear.

isPublic.description: If true, the credential mint is open to anyone and the member list is bypassed for read/sync access.

appExceptions.description: Apps that break from the default appAccessMode. Sent as a full replacement, not a delta.
